title: Jammu University pitches for dropping Jinnah and Iqbal from syllabus; NC, PDP oppose move
description: This followed protests by the Akhil Bharatiya Vidyarthi Parishad (ABVP) on Friday as they demanded that a chapter on Jinnah be dropped following which the university’s departmental affairs committee (DAC) chaired a meeting on March 22 ‘to deliberate upon the issues raised concerning the syllabi’
